hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.py) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && source api/venv/bin/activate && ruff check "$file" --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; *.js) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && npx eslint "$file" --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; *.css) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && npx stylelint "$file" --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; *.html) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && npx htmlhint "$file" 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *static/*) echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Static file changed — hard refresh required: Cmd+Shift+R in the browser"}' ;; esac; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *requirements.txt|*requirements-dev.txt|*package.json) echo '{"systemMessage": "📦 Dependency file changed — run: make generate-sbom to update docs/SBOM.md"}' ;; esac; fi
echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: make ci before merging · make lint if code changed · Cmd+Shift+R if static files changed"}'

echo 'Context was compacted. Reminders: (1) Run make ci before committing. (2) Run make lint after editing code. (3) Do NOT start the web server in foreground — it blocks. (4) Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) after static file edits. (5) All API routes use /api prefix. (6) Detailed rules in .claude/rules/'
